title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・一流のライバル

text_block_list.text:
King Halo has won the autumn Tenno Sho. She
closes her eyes and embraces the cheers of the
crowd before turning away from the applause.

She faces her two fiercest competitors, Special
Week and Seiun Sky.

The three exchange their deepest feelings—their
frustrations, their regrets, and their
gratitude—and laugh together.

A gust of wind blows past them, carrying their
voices toward the future where they'll continue to
run as rivals and as friends.
